name: Phase 6 — Threat Engagement at CAP
description: MVP slice: C2 strike-approval round trip gated to the QB with a WEZ deadline, P2P COP fan-out, and the scripted QB->ACP-1 return-link drop (FAIL_MISSING_ACK).
contingency: QB->ACP-1 return link degraded to bursty/lossy at the contingency tick; the approval reply stalls in FAIL_MISSING_ACK.
